title: trifolium ankaratrense
intro: Trifolium ankaratrense, also known as Ankaret clover, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to Madagascar. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. In traditional medicine, Ankaret clover is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
